known_limitations: The vendor payment change case study is a public explanation artifact, not fraud prevention or payment approval
Atlas connects business-flow evidence references into metadata-only proof and does not replace accounting software, bank portals, approval tools, GRC, legal review, or compliance review
The case study excludes bank account numbers, routing numbers, payment card data, raw invoices, raw contracts, credentials, tokens, private keys, private business records, and unredacted emails
Atlas production status is a local contract, not deployment certification
